message:
feat: add iter/next/range builtins and extend exception types

- Add iter() and next() builtins to dispatch and codegen
- Add range() as first-class object using runtime.builtins.range
- Extend max()/min() to support single iterable argument
- Add runtime RangeIterator for lazy range evaluation
- Add 20+ exception types to ExceptionTypes map (StopIteration, NotImplementedError, AssertionError, etc.)

CPython tests: 13 → 14 passing

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,12 @@ const BuiltinMap = std.StaticStringMap(BuiltinHandler).initComptime(.{
     .{ "reversed", builtins.genReversed },
     .{ "map", builtins.genMap },
     .{ "filter", builtins.genFilter },
+    // Iterator builtins
+    .{ "iter", builtins.genIter },
+    .{ "next", builtins.genNext },
+    .{ "range", builtins.genRange },
+    .{ "enumerate", builtins.genEnumerate },
+    .{ "zip", builtins.genZip },
     // String/char
     .{ "chr", builtins.genChr },
     .{ "ord", builtins.genOrd },

@@ -149,6 +149,25 @@ const ExceptionTypes = std.StaticStringMap(void).initComptime(.{
     .{ "FileNotFoundError", {} },
     .{ "IOError", {} },
     .{ "Exception", {} },
+    .{ "StopIteration", {} },
+    .{ "NotImplementedError", {} },
+    .{ "AssertionError", {} },
+    .{ "OverflowError", {} },
+    .{ "ImportError", {} },
+    .{ "ModuleNotFoundError", {} },
+    .{ "OSError", {} },
+    .{ "PermissionError", {} },
+    .{ "TimeoutError", {} },
+    .{ "ConnectionError", {} },
+    .{ "RecursionError", {} },
+    .{ "MemoryError", {} },
+    .{ "LookupError", {} },
+    .{ "ArithmeticError", {} },
+    .{ "BufferError", {} },
+    .{ "EOFError", {} },
+    .{ "GeneratorExit", {} },
+    .{ "SystemExit", {} },
+    .{ "KeyboardInterrupt", {} },
 });
 
 /// Check if with expression is a unittest context manager that should be skipped
